name: kilowattrel
flavor_texts: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.
It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.
text: Kilowattrel is the Frigatebird Pokémon. It is a electric and flying-type Pokémon. Abilities: wind-power, volt-absorb, competitive (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 70, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 105, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 125. Evolution line: wattrel → kilowattrel. Lore: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day. It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.
